00030 #ifndef _STDINT_H_
00031 #define _STDINT_H_
00032 
00033 /*
00034  * <stdint.h> - C99 header file with sized integer types.
00035  */
00036 
00037 #include <kern/types.h>
00038 
00039 typedef __i8 int8_t;
00040 typedef __i16 int16_t;
00041 typedef __i32 int32_t;
00042 typedef __i64 int64_t;
00043 typedef __u8 uint8_t;
00044 typedef __u16 uint16_t;
00045 typedef __u32 uint32_t;
00046 typedef __u64 uint64_t;
00047 
00048 typedef __intptr_t intptr_t;
00049 typedef __uintptr_t uintptr_t;
00050 
00051 #endif /* _STDINT_H_ */
